purpose: Docs-only story: ship the theme-developer-facing documentation for the pluggable-themes system landed by S0-S4. Produces docs/themes/authoring-guide.md (the full field/behavior reference an author needs to write a valid theme folder) and app/src/themes/README.md (a short pointer file). No code, schema, generator, or test file is touched (AC-DOC-1; scope.excludes). There is no runtime module to design an interface for -- the 'public API' this story ships is the guide's section structure, not a code contract.
dependencies_allowed: authoring-guide -> (nothing; markdown only, read-only reference to schema.ts/contrast.ts/treatments/*/fontUnion.ts/generate-theme-registry.mjs for accuracy, no code edits or imports)
dependencies_forbidden: authoring-guide -> any edit to app/src/themes/*.ts, app/src/themes/treatments/*, app/src/themes/*/manifest.ts, app/scripts/generate-theme-registry.mjs, or any test file
